name: oath-and-honor
description: Liz Cheney's 'Oath and Honor: A Memoir and a Warning' — a firsthand account of the January 6th investigation from the Republican Congresswoman who put her oath to the Constitution above her party.
useCase: Understand the January 6th investigation, learn about constitutional principles and political courage, and find hope for defending American democracy.
knownRisks: Strongly political — primarily relevant to U.S. politics and January 6th
May be polarizing — Cheney is a controversial figure within the Republican Party
Focuses on a specific moment in U.S. history — may not age well as a reference
